prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find and compare how /healthz and /readyz endpoints are implemented across kubernetes/kubernetes, grafana/grafana, and prometheus/prometheus. Identify the Go source files in each repo that register these endpoints and what checks each performs (DB, cache, dependencies).
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find and compare how /healthz and /readyz endpoints are implemented across kubernetes/kubernetes, grafana/grafana, and prometheus/prometheus. Identify the Go source files in each repo that register these endpoints and what checks each performs (DB, cache, dependencies).
